explanation: The diagram shows multiple directed cycles among backend services. A clear cycle exists between Customer Self-Service Backend and Policy Management Backend (bidirectional ActiveMQ). Another cycle is Customer Self-Service Backend → Customer Core → Policy Management Backend → Spring Boot Admin → Customer Self-Service Backend. There is also a cycle involving Customer Management Backend via Customer Management Backend → Customer Core → Policy Management Backend → Spring Boot Admin → Customer Management Backend. These circular chains indicate the Cyclic Dependency smell is clearly present.
